RETRACE_SELECT: Choose a card to add an Exhaust copy of to your hand.
EXPLORER_SELECT: Choose up to {Discard} cards to discard.
TRANSMUTE_SELECT: Choose any number of cards to transform.
ALCHEMY_SELECT: Choose a card in your hand to Exhaust.
TERMINAL_HAND_SELECT: Choose a card in your hand; its cost is reduced by 1 this combat.
TERMINAL_DRAW_SELECT: Choose a card in your draw pile; its cost is increased by 1 this combat.
